apis.Name: Customer Identity Service
apis.Short Description: Centralized customer identity, authentication, and profile management
apis.Detailed Description: Enterprise OAuth 2.0 and OpenID Connect identity provider. Handles customer registration, login, MFA, session management, profile CRUD, and consent management. Supports SAML federation for B2B partners.
apis.AI Usage Notes: Read-only profile lookups permitted. No auth token generation by AI agents.
apis.AI Recommended Use Cases: User profile enrichment, identity verification checks
apis.AI Prohibited Use Cases: Direct authentication, password resets, MFA bypass

apis.Name: Payment Processing Gateway
apis.Short Description: Unified payment processing for all channels — cards, ACH, digital wallets
apis.Detailed Description: Handles payment authorization, capture, settlement, refunds, and chargebacks across all payment methods. PCI Level 1 certified. Supports tokenization and vault services.
apis.AI Usage Notes: Payment operations are strictly prohibited for AI agent access.
apis.AI Recommended Use Cases: None
apis.AI Prohibited Use Cases: All payment operations — must use human-initiated flows

apis.Name: Product Catalog Service
apis.Short Description: Master product data, pricing, and availability across all channels
apis.Detailed Description: Serves the enterprise product catalog including SKUs, descriptions, hierarchies, pricing tiers, promotions, availability, and media assets. Supports real-time inventory sync and localized content.
apis.AI Usage Notes: Full read access for product lookups, recommendations, and comparison queries.
apis.AI Recommended Use Cases: Product search, comparison, recommendation generation, inventory checks
apis.AI Prohibited Use Cases: Price modifications, catalog write operations

apis.Name: Salesforce CRM API
apis.Short Description: Salesforce REST API for customer relationship data
apis.Detailed Description: Vendor-provided Salesforce REST API for accessing accounts, contacts, opportunities, cases, and custom objects. Used for CRM integration, reporting, and customer 360 views.
apis.AI Usage Notes: Read-only queries for account and opportunity data. No record creation without human approval.
apis.AI Recommended Use Cases: Account lookups, pipeline analysis, contact enrichment
apis.AI Prohibited Use Cases: Lead creation, opportunity stage changes, record deletion

apis.Name: Twilio Messaging API
apis.Short Description: SMS, MMS, and WhatsApp messaging via Twilio
apis.Detailed Description: Vendor-provided API for outbound and inbound messaging. Supports SMS, MMS, WhatsApp Business, and programmable voice. Used for customer notifications, 2FA codes, and marketing campaigns.
apis.AI Usage Notes: AI may compose messages but sending requires human approval workflow.
apis.AI Recommended Use Cases: Message drafting, delivery status checks
apis.AI Prohibited Use Cases: Autonomous message sending without human approval

apis.Name: Employee Directory Service
apis.Short Description: Employee profiles, org hierarchy, and contact information
apis.Detailed Description: Internal service providing employee lookup, organizational hierarchy, reporting structure, contact details, and role-based attributes. Sourced from Workday HCM with near-real-time sync.
apis.AI Usage Notes: Full read access for org lookups. PII fields (SSN, DOB) are excluded from AI-accessible responses.
apis.AI Recommended Use Cases: Manager lookups, org chart queries, team composition analysis
apis.AI Prohibited Use Cases: PII extraction, bulk export of employee data

apis.Name: Order Management Service
apis.Short Description: Enterprise order lifecycle — creation, fulfillment, returns
apis.Detailed Description: Manages the full order lifecycle from creation through fulfillment, shipping, delivery, and returns. Integrates with inventory, payment, shipping carriers, and ERP systems.
apis.AI Usage Notes: Read-only order status queries. No order creation or modification by AI agents.
apis.AI Recommended Use Cases: Order status lookup, fulfillment tracking, return eligibility checks
apis.AI Prohibited Use Cases: Order creation, cancellation, refund processing

apis.Name: Notification Hub
apis.Short Description: Multi-channel notification delivery — email, push, in-app, SMS
apis.Detailed Description: Centralized notification orchestration service. Routes notifications across email (SendGrid), push (Firebase), in-app, and SMS (Twilio) channels. Supports templates, preferences, batching, and delivery tracking.
apis.AI Usage Notes: AI agents can send notifications through approved templates only. No custom HTML injection.
apis.AI Recommended Use Cases: Sending templated notifications, checking delivery status
apis.AI Prohibited Use Cases: Custom HTML emails, bulk marketing sends

apis.Name: ServiceNow ITSM API
apis.Short Description: ServiceNow incident, problem, and change management API
apis.Detailed Description: Vendor-provided ServiceNow Table API and CMDB API for IT service management. Used for incident creation, status updates, change request automation, and CMDB synchronization.
apis.AI Usage Notes: AI can create incidents and query status. Change requests require human approval.
apis.AI Recommended Use Cases: Incident creation, status queries, knowledge base search
apis.AI Prohibited Use Cases: Change approvals, CMDB modifications, user provisioning

apis.Name: Data Lake Query Service
apis.Short Description: SQL-over-HTTP for enterprise data lake — Snowflake backend
apis.Detailed Description: Abstraction layer over Snowflake data warehouse. Provides governed SQL query execution with row-level security, query cost controls, and result caching. Used for analytics, reporting, and data science workloads.
apis.AI Usage Notes: AI agents can execute read-only queries against approved schemas. No DDL or DML operations.
apis.AI Recommended Use Cases: Analytics queries, report generation, data exploration
apis.AI Prohibited Use Cases: Schema modifications, data deletion, cross-schema joins without approval

apis.Name: Document Generation Service
apis.Short Description: PDF and document generation from templates
apis.Detailed Description: Generates PDFs, Excel reports, and formatted documents from templates and data payloads. Supports merge fields, conditional sections, digital signatures, and batch processing.
apis.AI Usage Notes: AI can trigger document generation using existing templates. No template creation.
apis.AI Recommended Use Cases: Report generation, invoice creation, letter generation
apis.AI Prohibited Use Cases: Template modification, document deletion

apis.Name: Partner Data Exchange
apis.Short Description: B2B data exchange with supply chain partners via secure file and API gateway
apis.Detailed Description: Manages inbound and outbound data exchange with supply chain and logistics partners. Supports EDI, JSON, and XML formats. Provides partner onboarding, message transformation, routing, and delivery tracking.
apis.AI Usage Notes: B2B data exchange is not available for AI agent use due to contractual and compliance restrictions.

apis.Name: Geolocation & Mapping Service
apis.Short Description: Address validation, geocoding, and distance calculation via Google Maps Platform
apis.Detailed Description: Wrapper around Google Maps Platform APIs for address validation, forward/reverse geocoding, distance matrix, and static map generation. Provides caching and rate-limit management.
apis.AI Usage Notes: Full access for geocoding and distance calculations.
apis.AI Recommended Use Cases: Address validation, distance calculation, store locator
apis.AI Prohibited Use Cases: None

apis.Name: Legacy Mainframe Gateway
apis.Short Description: SOAP/REST bridge to mainframe transaction systems (CICS/IMS)
apis.Detailed Description: Integration gateway providing REST endpoints that translate to CICS and IMS transactions on the mainframe. Handles data transformation between JSON and COBOL copybook formats.
apis.AI Usage Notes: Mainframe transactions are not approved for AI agent access. High risk of data corruption.

apis.Name: Content Delivery API
apis.Short Description: Headless CMS API for marketing content, blogs, and digital assets
apis.Detailed Description: Contentful-based headless CMS API serving marketing pages, blog posts, press releases, help articles, and digital asset management. Supports localization in 12 languages.
apis.AI Usage Notes: Full read access for content queries. No content authoring by AI.
apis.AI Recommended Use Cases: Content retrieval, article search, asset lookup
apis.AI Prohibited Use Cases: Content creation, publishing, asset deletion

apis.Name: Fraud Detection Engine
apis.Short Description: Real-time fraud scoring and transaction risk assessment
apis.Detailed Description: ML-powered fraud detection service. Evaluates transactions in real-time using behavioral analytics, device fingerprinting, and network graph analysis. Returns risk scores and recommended actions.
apis.AI Usage Notes: AI can query risk scores for analysis. Cannot modify fraud rules or whitelist transactions.
apis.AI Recommended Use Cases: Risk score lookups, fraud trend analysis
apis.AI Prohibited Use Cases: Rule modifications, transaction whitelisting, model retraining

apis.Name: Inventory Availability Service
apis.Short Description: Real-time inventory levels across all warehouses and stores
apis.Detailed Description: Provides real-time Available-to-Promise (ATP) inventory data across distribution centers, stores, and drop-ship vendors. Supports reservation, allocation, and inventory event streaming.
apis.AI Usage Notes: Read-only inventory queries. No reservation or allocation operations.
apis.AI Recommended Use Cases: Stock level checks, availability predictions, reorder alerts
apis.AI Prohibited Use Cases: Inventory reservations, allocation changes, write operations

apis.Name: Customer 360 API
apis.Short Description: Unified customer view aggregating data from CRM, orders, support, and marketing
apis.Detailed Description: Aggregation service that provides a single unified view of a customer by combining data from CRM, order management, support tickets, loyalty program, and marketing engagement. Powers customer service and personalization.
apis.AI Usage Notes: Read-only access with PII masking. Full PII requires explicit consent workflow.
apis.AI Recommended Use Cases: Customer profile enrichment, sentiment analysis, churn prediction
apis.AI Prohibited Use Cases: PII export, cross-customer correlation without consent

apis.Name: Shipping & Logistics API
apis.Short Description: Multi-carrier shipping rates, label generation, and tracking
apis.Detailed Description: Unified shipping API aggregating UPS, FedEx, USPS, and DHL. Provides rate shopping, label generation, tracking, and returns processing. Handles hazmat and international customs documentation.
apis.AI Usage Notes: Rate queries and tracking lookups only. No label generation or shipment creation by AI.
apis.AI Recommended Use Cases: Rate comparison, delivery estimates, tracking lookups
apis.AI Prohibited Use Cases: Label generation, shipment creation, carrier account modifications

apis.Name: Analytics Event Collector
apis.Short Description: Client-side and server-side event ingestion for behavioral analytics
apis.Detailed Description: High-throughput event collection service for behavioral analytics. Accepts events from web, mobile, and server-side sources. Feeds data warehouse, real-time dashboards, and ML pipelines.
apis.AI Usage Notes: AI can emit events and query aggregated metrics. No access to raw PII event data.
apis.AI Recommended Use Cases: Event emission, metric queries, funnel analysis
apis.AI Prohibited Use Cases: Raw event data access containing PII, user session replay

apis.Name: Legacy Order Fulfillment SOAP
apis.Short Description: Legacy SOAP-based order fulfillment system — scheduled for deprecation
apis.Detailed Description: Original order fulfillment system built on WebSphere. SOAP/XML interface to warehouse management. Being replaced by Order Management Service (API-007). Migration in progress.
apis.AI Usage Notes: Deprecated. Use Order Management Service (API-007) instead.
apis.Deprecation Policy: Sunset after all consumers migrate to API-007

apis.Name: Cloud Cost Management API
apis.Short Description: AWS/Azure/GCP cost data, budgets, and optimization recommendations
apis.Detailed Description: Internal service aggregating cloud cost data from AWS Cost Explorer, Azure Cost Management, and GCP Billing. Provides team-level cost allocation, budget tracking, anomaly detection, and optimization recommendations.
apis.AI Usage Notes: Full read access for cost analysis. No budget modification.
apis.AI Recommended Use Cases: Cost analysis, budget monitoring, savings recommendations
apis.AI Prohibited Use Cases: Budget modifications, resource provisioning

apis.Name: Compliance Attestation Service
apis.Short Description: Compliance evidence collection, attestation tracking, and audit trail
apis.Detailed Description: Manages compliance control attestations, evidence collection, and audit readiness. Supports SOC2, GDPR, HIPAA, and PCI-DSS frameworks. Integrates with GRC tools for continuous compliance monitoring.
apis.AI Usage Notes: Read-only access to compliance status. Cannot submit attestations on behalf of humans.
apis.AI Recommended Use Cases: Compliance status checks, audit preparation, gap analysis
apis.AI Prohibited Use Cases: Attestation submission, evidence modification, control exception approval

apis.Name: Machine Learning Model Serving
apis.Short Description: Internal ML model inference API — recommendation, classification, NLP
apis.Detailed Description: Serves trained ML models as REST endpoints. Supports recommendation engines, text classification, sentiment analysis, and demand forecasting. Models are versioned and A/B testable.
apis.AI Usage Notes: AI agents can invoke prediction endpoints. Cannot retrain or deploy models.
apis.AI Recommended Use Cases: Predictions, classifications, recommendations, NLP analysis
apis.AI Prohibited Use Cases: Model training, deployment, A/B test configuration

apis.Name: Workforce Scheduling API
apis.Short Description: Employee shift scheduling, time tracking, and labor forecasting
apis.Detailed Description: Proposed new API to unify workforce scheduling across retail stores, distribution centers, and contact centers. Will replace three separate legacy scheduling systems.
apis.AI Usage Notes: Designed from the start for AI schedule optimization agents.
apis.AI Recommended Use Cases: Schedule optimization, demand forecasting, coverage analysis
apis.AI Prohibited Use Cases: Direct schedule publishing without manager approval

consumers.Purpose: User login, registration, and session management
Identity resolution for unified customer view
Product browsing, search, and detail pages
Product browsing and search on mobile
Nightly product catalog sync for analytics
Case creation and customer history lookup
Order lookup and modification for support agents
Fulfillment trigger and shipping label request
Welcome emails, password reset, security alerts
Real-time fraud scoring on every transaction
Unified customer view for support agents

contracts.License Constraints: 500 API users, 1M API calls/day included, $0.01 per overage call
contracts.Risk Notes: Approaching API call limit. Renegotiation recommended at renewal.

contracts.License Constraints: Committed to 500K msg/day minimum. Unused volume not refundable.
contracts.Risk Notes: Renewal in 45 days. Evaluate alternatives (AWS SNS, MessageBird).

contracts.License Constraints: 200 fulfiller licenses, 5 custom apps, unlimited integrators
contracts.Risk Notes: Custom app count approaching limit. May need upgrade tier.

contracts.License Constraints: $200 monthly credit, then standard pricing. No SLA for free tier.
contracts.Risk Notes: Low risk. Well within budget. Consider caching to reduce costs further.

contracts.License Constraints: 5 spaces, 48 content types per space, 12 locales
contracts.Risk Notes: Content types nearing limit in primary space. May need restructuring or upgrade.

environments.Notes: Certificate renewal pending. Must coordinate with mainframe team.

changes.Description: Add real-time pricing tier support for B2B customers. New query parameter `pricingTier` on product endpoints.
Begin formal deprecation. All consumers must migrate to Order Management Service (API-007) within 6 months.
changes.Impacted Consumers: Warehouse Management System, Returns Processing System

changes.Description: Upgrade OAuth token signing from RS256 to RS384. Rolling migration over 2 weeks.
Add device fingerprint enrichment to fraud scoring model. New optional field in request payload.
Mainframe CICS transaction ACCT-INQ response format changing from EBCDIC fixed-width to UTF-8 JSON. Gateway must update transformation layer.
Add store-level inventory endpoints for BOPIS (buy-online-pick-up-in-store) support.
Add query cost estimation endpoint. Returns estimated credits before execution.

reuse-requests.Requested Capability: Customer notification delivery across email, SMS, and push channels
reuse-requests.Business Context: Building a new loyalty rewards notification system. Need to send points balance alerts, reward redemption confirmations, and tier upgrade notices.
reuse-requests.Gap Analysis: Notification Hub supports all required channels. Minor gap: no loyalty-specific templates exist yet, but template system supports custom creation.
reuse-requests.Decision Reason: Notification Hub fully meets requirements. Team will create 4 new templates within existing system. Estimated savings: $180K vs building standalone notification capability.

reuse-requests.Requested Capability: Real-time currency conversion for international pricing
reuse-requests.Business Context: Expanding e-commerce to 12 new markets. Need real-time FX rates for pricing localization on product pages and checkout.
reuse-requests.Gap Analysis: No existing currency conversion capability found. Product Catalog Service (API-003) handles pricing tiers but not FX conversion. Payment Gateway (API-002) converts at settlement but doesn't expose rates.
reuse-requests.Decision Reason: No existing API matches. Architecture Review approved building a new FX Rate Service wrapping a vendor API (Open Exchange Rates). Estimated build: 6 weeks.

reuse-requests.Requested Capability: Employee skills and certification tracking for project staffing
reuse-requests.Business Context: Project managers need to find employees with specific skills and current certifications for project staffing decisions.
reuse-requests.Gap Analysis: Employee Directory has basic role and department data. Does NOT have skills inventory or certification tracking. Would require significant enhancement or a new service.

reuse-requests.Requested Capability: Automated contract document generation with e-signature integration
reuse-requests.Business Context: Legal team processes 200+ vendor contracts/month. Need to auto-generate contracts from templates and route for e-signature (DocuSign).
reuse-requests.Gap Analysis: Document Generation Service handles PDF generation from templates. Gap: no e-signature integration exists. Would need DocuSign API integration added or as a separate capability.

reuse-requests.Requested Capability: Customer sentiment analysis from support tickets and social media
reuse-requests.Business Context: VP of CX wants real-time sentiment tracking across all customer touchpoints to drive NPS improvement initiatives.
reuse-requests.Gap Analysis: ML Model Serving has a sentiment analysis model deployed. Gap: need to integrate with Salesforce cases (API-004) and social media feeds. Pipeline and dashboard work required.
